contacts.title: Area General Manager / General Manager
contacts.other_contact_detail: Directly responded to guest reviews as GM of Montcalm Mayfair; use main hotel line for property-level ops, reservations or revenue queries.
contacts.fit_reason: Property and area leadership with direct influence over reservations, revenue strategy, guest journey and systems at the flagship Montcalm Mayfair.
contacts.contact_evidence_summary: LinkedIn profile, TripAdvisor review responses as General Manager, RocketReach and news mentions confirming current Montcalm Collection role. Property phone publicly listed and tied to him via responses. No personal email found.

contacts.title: Guest Experience Manager
contacts.other_contact_detail: Signs numerous public guest review responses on TripAdvisor and Marriott sites; main hotel line reaches guest experience / CRM team.
contacts.fit_reason: Direct ownership of guest experience, review responses, messaging and CRM processes; strong fit for guest messaging automation and digital guest journey tech.
contacts.contact_evidence_summary: LinkedIn profile + dozens of signed public responses on TripAdvisor/Marriott tying her name and title directly to the role at Montcalm Mayfair. Property phone listed on official site. High intimacy due to repeated public role confirmation.

evidence.quote_or_fact: Guest Experience Manager at Montcalm Collection / Montcalm Mayfair.

contacts.title: General Manager (historical reference)
contacts.other_contact_detail: Referenced in guest reviews as General Manager; use current main line for any follow-up with current GM team.
contacts.fit_reason: Historical GM role at related Montcalm property; general leadership relevance to operations and reservations. Included to broaden list per ICP adjacent guidance as public senior names are limited.
contacts.contact_evidence_summary: TripAdvisor review response references 'Ankur b. General Manager'. Combined with overall scarcity of 20+ distinct public names for junior ICP roles (reservations, digital, marketing), this and brand-level names were prioritized. Current GM is Tamas Jurca. No email.

evidence.quote_or_fact: Thank you once again, Ankur b. General Manager.

contacts.title: Cluster Revenue Manager
contacts.other_contact_detail: Cluster commercial role; route via Montcalm Collection main enquiries or Mayfair line +44 (0)20 7958 3200 asking for revenue team.
contacts.fit_reason: Leads revenue management across the Montcalm portfolio; core stakeholder for revenue-tech adoption, AI booking automation, distribution and pricing systems.
contacts.contact_evidence_summary: Multiple job boards, RocketReach and sales directories confirm current Cluster Revenue Manager role at Montcalm Collection. No personal LinkedIn, email or phone located but role is strongly evidenced. Property phone provides routing path.

contacts.title: Head of Hotels
contacts.other_contact_detail: Montcalm Mayfair main line: +44 (0)20 7958 3200 (brand oversight; ask for Head of Hotels or commercial team)
contacts.fit_reason: Oversees entire Montcalm Collection including Mayfair flagship; public comments emphasize digital innovation, guest experience, responsible luxury and revenue optimization aligning directly with AI booking automation, revenue-tech and guest messaging.
contacts.contact_evidence_summary: Multiple independent news interviews and articles confirming role and focus on innovation/digital/guest experience post-Mayfair relaunch. Strong LinkedIn presence. General brand/property phone available for routing. No personal email or X handle located in public sources.
